All I really needed was a requisition form for an x-ray, which had been overlooked when the original walk-in clinic doctor requested an appointment to an ortho-surgeon. (X-ray was required before seeing the ortho). Back to the Walk-in Clinic... I tried.... I tried for weeks to get an appointment through another online booking app for local walk-in clinics. There are only a few spots open, a few days a week to book an appointment online. There is also a "waitlist" if they add more open slots...No luck, over and over again. I decided to finally try out Maple. It was well overdue! Very easy to use. I was contacted later that afternoon via text/ messaging through the app by a doctor. You are also able to click on their profile and read about the doctor you are talking to. After uploading proof of my ID, I answered a few more questions, within a few more minutes a requisition form was uploaded. I printed off a copy and called the Diagnostic Imaging Department at QEH and made my appointment. A really great service! I will definitely use this again if I need to. It was really great to be able to get a form I needed without actually filling a seat in a waiting room.
